objections.objection_text: I'm spending savings monthly just to survive my deficit (€1100 month).
objections.underlying_belief: Safety is found in the current bank balance rather than in the future capacity to serve the marketplace.
objections.underlying_fear: Running out of money before the 'New Phase' begins; total financial ruin as a father.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Deficit is a signal to improve your 'Offer' to the marketplace, not a signal to hoard remaining resources. Investment in clarity (coaching) fixes the root of the deficit.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: I am paying half her mortgage, my full rent... I'm having to spend about €3,600 a month... I'm pulling out savings every single month. Just to survive.
